description: '''Breakcore''' is a style of [[electronic dance music]] that emerged from [[jungle music|jungle]], [[Hardcore (electronic dance music genre)|hardcore]], and [[drum and bass|drum & bass]] in the mid-to-late 1990s. It is characterized by very complex and intricate [[breakbeat]]s and a wide palette of [[sampling (music)|sampling]] sources played at high tempos, though there is much debate in the breakcore subculture as to what breakcore itself is.
